landing.title: Welcome to Røldal Gym
landing.subtitle: Become a member or buy a drop-in and get instant access.

plans.title: Choose a plan
plans.foreignNote: Visiting from abroad? You can also pay by card.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.name: Name
signup.phoneConfirmed: Phone number confirmed. Choose payment method:

membership.title: My membership
membership.pinHint: Use this on the keypad at the door if the network is down.
membership.cancelHint: Your membership ends immediately and you lose door access.
membership.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your membership?

dropin.title: Drop-in
dropin.subtitle: Pay now and receive a one-time code via SMS.
dropin.success: Paid! The one-time code has been sent to {phone}.
dropin.paidBody: You will get an SMS with a one-time code to enter on the keypad at the door. The code is valid for 4 hours.

errors.outsideGeofence: You must be at the gym to open the door.
